title.en: Of course, it could also be a treasure similar ...

content.en:
Ye Tian didn't know if his guess was accurate, but the possibility still existed.

Of course, it could also be a treasure similar to a multidimensional vase.

"Duowei Bao bottle imitation, I still can't tell anyone, otherwise once it leaks, the fourth or third realm will attack, and I don't have the slightest confidence to resist now!"

At this moment, there is not a drop of multi-dimensional essence in this multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation, and if you want to condense multi-dimensional essence, you must absorb the flesh and blood of the extra-dimensional realm.

Under normal circumstances, the place where the multi-dimensional treasure bottle is located, if the multi-dimensional treasure bottle is not sealed, an invisible realm will be formed, and once the extra-dimensional realm in the domain falls, it will be actively absorbed.

But Ye Tian couldn't take out the Duowei Treasure Bottle, or even let it be exposed, so naturally he couldn't use it in this way.

"Let's hunt some extradimensional creatures in the extradimensional realm, and then bring them back, so that the multidimensional treasure bottle can absorb and condense into multidimensional essence!"

Ye Tian's other replica bodies immediately took action to find extradimensional creatures.

Of course.

He won't look for those extradimensional creatures with backgrounds, otherwise it will be easy to provoke the extradimensional realm of the third realm, although he can't be traced by the third realm or even the fourth realm, but if he is followed by 310, it will be troublesome.

So, he's still a little more low-key.

......

Seven thousand five hundred and six territories.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came here, and after his continuous search, he finally found a superdimensional creature of the first realm.

This extradimensional creature of the first realm is the Ice Flow Sea Serpent, which is roughly equivalent to the middle realm of the first realm, and has been sleeping.

Many extra-dimensional creatures don't like cultivation very much, they all like to sleep, and in the midst of sleep, the super-dimensional bloodline will slowly increase.

Therefore, among the many extradimensional territories, there are many sleeping extradimensional creatures.

Some extradimensional creatures sleep in hidden places that are not easy to spot.

But Ye Tian, as an existence of the second realm, it was naturally very easy to find the sleeping place of the transcendent creatures of the first realm.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian shot directly, and with a single blow, he killed the ice sea snake and took away the other party's corpse.

In the following days, Ye Tian searched for a superdimensional creature whose strength had reached the first realm, killed them, and then brought them back to let the multidimensional treasure bottle imitation absorb flesh and blood.

Of course, this kind of hunting is very dangerous, and sometimes you will encounter extradimensional creatures at the peak of the second realm.

this day.

Ye Tian broke into the lair of a second realm peak superdimensional creature, and the strength of the other party was very terrifying, whether it was superdimensional rules, physical body, or cultivation, they were all above him.

With just one blow, Ye Tian was hit hard by the other party.

After some killing, his replica body fell.

......

"There are many extradimensional creatures in the second realm hidden in many extradimensional territories, that is, I am not afraid of falling, and if it is replaced by other extradimensional realms, how dare I look for extradimensional creatures like this!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

Among the many extradimensional realms, there are too many hidden secrets and dangers, and it is not impossible that a third-realm or even fourth-realm extradimensional creature will appear somewhere.

For example, in the Red Dragon Yuan, there is a Tricky Wood Red Dragon at the peak of the Third Realm.

It is not impossible that there are more powerful fourth-realm extradimensional beings elsewhere.

Fortunately, Ye Tian's Great Realm Armor Technique had been cultivated to the third layer, and the fourth realm could not deduce any traces of him.

So, he doesn't have to worry so much about his own safety.

When a head of super-dimensional creatures was absorbed and refined by the imitation of the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, after a period of gestation, a drop of multi-dimensional essence was finally condensed.

If it is a real multi-dimensional treasure bottle, it is impossible to be so slow, and it can quickly condense the multi-dimensional essence.

But Ye Tian only has imitations.

"This is the multi-dimensional essence, see the effect!"

Ye Tian took out a drop of multi-dimensional essence and swallowed it in one gulp.

The multi-dimensional essence is integrated into the soul will, and the void in front of him seems to be different in the next moment, and a large number of extra-dimensional rules (BGAG) seem to be presented in front of him, so that he can observe the traces of these extra-dimensional rules, so as to achieve the effect of rapid enlightenment.

Immediately.

Ye Tian began to comprehend the rules of the extradimensional dimension, and even used the Yutian Lotus Platform.

And as the effect of his enlightenment skyrocketed, the consumption of multi-dimensional essence also skyrocketed.

In this way, it will not take long for the essence to be depleted. []

After some time, this drop of multidimensional essence is depleted.

"The extra-dimensional rules have improved the realm of a hundred threads!"

Ye Tian showed excitement.

This is just an imitation, if it is a real multi-dimensional treasure bottle, the effect of the condensed multi-dimensional essence will definitely be better.

Next, Ye Tian used this drop of superdimensional essence to improve his extradimensional rules, and his own extradimensional rules were also improving at an extremely terrifying speed.

The years passed, and dozens of extradimensional epochs passed.

Ye Tian had already refined a large number of multi-dimensional essences, but his progress in the later stage was getting slower and slower, and the effect of multi-dimensional essences was of little use to him.

After all, this is just an imitation of the Duowei Bao bottle, and it would be strange if it could be infinitely improved!

The true value of the Duowei vase is not for personal use, but for the use of one party.

Even if this multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation is enough to cultivate a large number of second realms for a large number of years for the human race, this is its true use.

But Ye Tian didn't dare to use the Duowei Treasure Bottle to frantically help the Terran to advance to the second realm, once he did so, the news that the Terran had cultivated multiple second realms in a short period of time leaked, and the fool also knew that the Terran must have obtained amazing treasures.

At that time, maybe there will be a third realm that guesses that the Terrans have obtained the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, so as to attack the Terrans.

Therefore, when his strength was not enough to protect the imitation of the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, he at most let his relatives use the multi-dimensional essence.

"Xingchen is about to break through to the extra-dimensional realm, when he breaks through, give him multi-dimensional essence and let him comprehend the extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Another period of time has passed, and Ye Tian's super-dimensional rule realm has improved a little more, but the progress has been very slow, and a drop of multi-dimensional essence is now at most giving him ten traces of super-dimensional rule realm.

This was because his extradimensional rule realm had already reached the level of twenty-three thousand five hundred threads.

"I've obtained the multi-dimensional treasure bottle imitation, it's still so difficult to improve the realm of the super-dimensional rules, and the other second realms want to raise the super-dimensional rules to the seven-point realm, and break through to the third realm one hundred percent, it's almost impossible!"

At this moment, Ye Tian finally knew the difficulty of impacting the third realm, no wonder that the endless years had passed, and the six thousand number one territory had hardly heard of any second realm breaking through to the third realm.

Of course, some of the second realms have already left the territory of the sixth thousand, and the territory of the fifth thousand, perhaps breaking through to the third realm in the territory of the five thousands.

But even in the territory of five thousand, it is extremely difficult to break through to the third realm, and without a big opportunity and countless resource supplies, there is still no hope.
